items.summary:
At Amazon, Beatbot has launched a Pool Opening Sale that can save you up to 40% on a wide array of the brand’s robot pool cleaners. One notable return we’re seeing for a second time is Beatbot’s newest Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner down at $1,199 shipped that comes in a blue or purple colorway. Having just hit the market in mid-February with a $1,499 full price, we currently saw it discounted to $1,349 before the Big Spring Sale event at the end of March when it fell to the $1,199 low. During this sale, you’re getting a second chance at the $300 markdown that returns the costs to its all-time lowest price so far, just in time for you to automate your pool with a more premium option for cleaning during the coming swim season. You can learn more about it below, as well as browse the other robots getting discounts that start from $499.

That latter bundle gives you EcoFlow’s DELTA 3 Ultra Plus Portable Power Station with a 500W bifacial modular solar panel kit (4x 125W panels) for $1,799 shipped, with the closest match at Amazon being this 400W panel bundle sitting $200 higher in price. This package would run you $3,798 at full price, with the current discounts during this sale still tallying up to $2,148 were you to buy the station and panel kit separately. Up until today, the few inclusions we’ve seen of this bundle in sales only fell as low as $1,999, but you’re getting a bigger-than-ever 53% markdown that saves you $1,999 off the full MSRP for the lowest price we have tracked. items.title: Review: Whisker’s Litter-Robot 5 Pro continues mission to elevate homes with space-age improvements
items.summary:
In 2024, I began my journey into the world of self-cleaning litter boxes after spending the previous year doing heavy research into the seemingly endless array of brands/models that have flooded the market. At the end of this period, it was Whisker that came out on top, with my partner and me pulling the trigger on buying the Litter-Robot 3 Connect, which happened to be the brand’s first model to include app-based controls. I have since upgraded to the Litter-Robot 4 with the Litter-Hopper attachment, and now, in 2026, I’ve made another upgrade to the newest Litter-Robot 5 Pro (which came out alongside the EVO and standard 5 variations). Head below to get a full in-depth rundown on what you can expect with Whisker’s latest generation of the safest and most popular self-cleaning litter boxes on the market.
